title: 🎉 One Year of MyMeetings: Building the Recovery Community We Always Wanted
subtitle: June 2025 → June 2026
description: MyMeetings celebrates one year of helping people in recovery find meetings, stay accountable, and support one another. See the milestones, growth metrics, and community impact from Year One.
author: MyMeetings
keywords: MyMeetings anniversary, one year of MyMeetings, recovery community, sobriety tracking, AA meetings, meeting check-ins, recovery milestones, Year One
body:
One year ago, MyMeetings launched with a simple goal: make it easier for people in recovery to find meetings, stay accountable, and support one another.

Twelve months later, we’re humbled by how far this community has come.

By the Numbers

Over the past year, the MyMeetings community has grown beyond anything we imagined.

MilestoneYear One
Community Members4,400+
Meeting Check-Ins2,800+
Unique Meetings Visited1,200+
States Reached47
Average Check-Ins Per Active MemberNearly 12

Every one of those numbers represents someone choosing recovery, one day and one meeting at a time.

Growth That Never Slowed Down

The most exciting part of our first year wasn’t just growing—it was accelerating.

Each month brought more people discovering MyMeetings than the month before, with our strongest month bringing more than 600 new community members.

By the end of Year One, thousands of people had joined the platform, and momentum continues to build every week.

A Community Built Around Recovery

Recovery is deeply personal, and we’re grateful that so many members chose to make MyMeetings part of their journey.

During our first year:

  • Nearly 90% of members added their sobriety date.
  • Thousands began tracking milestones and building accountability.
  • Many shared their personal “why”—the reason they chose recovery—inspiring others throughout the community.

These aren’t just app features—they’re reminders that nobody has to recover alone.

Showing Up Matters

Recovery is built one meeting at a time.

Over the past year, members checked into thousands of meetings across the United States, representing more than 1,200 unique meeting groups.

A few things stood out:

  • Wednesday became our busiest day for check-ins.
  • Members continued checking into meetings throughout the entire year.
  • More than 70% of check-ins were verified using location services, helping build trust and accountability within the community.

Encouragement in Action

Recovery works best when people lift each other up.

During Year One, members exchanged nearly 4,000 likes celebrating milestones, meeting attendance, and daily wins.

Every interaction—whether it’s a check-in, a like, or a word of encouragement—helps remind someone they’re not doing this alone.

Celebrating Our Most Dedicated Members

Some members turned meeting attendance into an incredible habit.

Our most active community members logged well over 100 meetings during the year, with our attendance leader checking into more than 300 meetings—an inspiring demonstration of consistency and commitment.

Others explored more than 100 different meetings, showing just how diverse and welcoming the recovery community can be.

To everyone who showed up, encouraged someone else, or kept coming back: thank you for making MyMeetings what it is today.

Looking Ahead

Year One was just the beginning.

In twelve months we’ve grown into a nationwide recovery community spanning 47 states, helping thousands of people find meetings, build accountability, and stay connected.

We’re incredibly proud of what we’ve built together—but we’re even more excited about what’s coming next.

Thank you for being part of the journey.

Here’s to Year Two. ❤️
